lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: You gathered those feverfew stems yourself? That's genuine care.

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: Care? I gathered them because they sell. Don't romanticize practicality.

lines.speaker: Alon
lines.line: Maybe. But you gathered extra for the inn's cook, didn't you?

lines.speaker: Finn
lines.line: She... needed them. That's all. Don't make it into something.
